Detection Logic: 3+ failed login attempts from same IP in 15 min
Automatic Response: Log + alert + temporary rate limit increase

Detection Logic: Login from country with no prior history
Login outside normal hours (1-5 AM local)
Bot-like user agent or unknown device fingerprint
Less than 5 second interval between consecutive attempts
Automatic Response: Log + alert + temporary rate limit increase

Detection Logic: Multiple email attempts from single IP
Automatic Response: Log + alert + temporary IP block + force password reset
